name: Almond Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1-1.75 pound boned chicken breasts, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour chicken broth into Crock-Pot and cover. Turn Crock-Pot to High.
2. Brown meats and vegetables in the Crock-Pot.
3. In a skillet, heat bacon and butter; add chicken pieces and brown on all sides. Remove browned chicken to the Crock-Pot using a slotted spoon.
4. Quickly sauté celery, onion, and mushrooms in the skillet until slightly limp.
5. Add contents of skillet to Crock-Pot with soy sauce and salt. Stir well.
6. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 8 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
7. Serve over hot fluffy rice and garnish with toasted almonds.
Serves 4
